CVE-2024-28820.title: Buffer overflow in the extract_openvpn_cr function in openvpn-cr. ...
CVE-2024-28820.description: Buffer overflow in the extract_openvpn_cr function in openvpn-cr.c in openvpn-auth-ldap (aka the Three Rings Auth-LDAP plugin for OpenVPN) 2.0.4 allows attackers with a valid LDAP username and who can control the challenge/response password field to pass a string with more than 14 colons into this field and cause a buffer overflow.
